Bash(python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\(r'E:\\COBOL\\ISO+IEC+1989-2023_ for X_952804 COBOL.pdf'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
print\(\)
toc = doc.get_toc\(\)
for level, title, page in toc[:80]:
    indent = '  ' * \(level - 1\)
    print\(f'{indent}{title} \(p.{page}\)'\)
")
